name: IFRS Sustainability Disclosure Standards S1 & S2

topics.name: General Requirements for Disclosure of Sustainability-related Financial Information

disclosures.name: Reporting entity
disclosures.description: Sustainability-related financial disclosures shall be for the same reporting entity as the related financial statements.
disclosures.guidanceText: The reporting entity for sustainability-related financial disclosures shall be the same as for the related financial statements (paras 20-24).

disclosures.name: Governance — Sustainability risks and opportunities oversight
disclosures.description: Disclose information about the governance body or individual responsible for oversight of sustainability-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the governance body(s) or individual(s) responsible for oversight of sustainability-related risks and opportunities, how that body's responsibilities are reflected in terms of reference, and the body's skills and competencies (paras 26-27).

disclosures.name: Strategy — Business model and value chain
disclosures.description: Disclose information to enable users to understand the sustainability-related risks and opportunities that could affect the entity's business model and value chain.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose a description of sustainability-related risks and opportunities that could reasonably be expected to affect the entity's prospects, how they affect the business model and value chain, effects on strategy, and financial effects (paras 27-35).

disclosures.name: Strategy — Sustainability-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose the sustainability-related risks and opportunities that could reasonably be expected to affect the entity's prospects.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe sustainability-related risks and opportunities, their current and anticipated effects on the entity's financial position, financial performance, and cash flows (paras 30-35).

disclosures.name: Risk management — Processes to identify, assess and manage sustainability-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose information about processes used to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor sustainability-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the processes used to identify, assess, prioritise and monitor sustainability-related risks and opportunities, and the extent to which these are integrated into the entity's overall risk management process (paras 36-39).

disclosures.name: Metrics and targets
disclosures.description: Disclose metrics and targets used to measure, monitor and manage sustainability-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose information about metrics used by the entity to measure and monitor sustainability-related risks and opportunities, targets set and progress towards those targets (paras 40-42).

disclosures.name: Reporting entity identification
disclosures.description: Disclose the identity of the reporting entity.
disclosures.guidanceText: The entity shall identify itself clearly in its sustainability-related financial disclosures (para 42).

disclosures.name: Governance — Climate-related risks and opportunities oversight
disclosures.description: Disclose information about the governance body responsible for oversight of climate-related risks and opportunities.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the governance body(s) or individual(s) responsible for oversight of climate-related risks and opportunities (para 6(a)).

disclosures.name: Strategy — Climate-related risks and opportunities
disclosures.description: Disclose information about climate-related risks and opportunities that could reasonably be expected to affect the entity's prospects.
disclosures.guidanceText: Describe climate-related risks and opportunities and their current and anticipated effects on the entity's business model, strategy, financial position, and cash flows (paras 10-22).

disclosures.name: Strategy — Climate resilience
disclosures.description: Disclose information to enable users to understand the resilience of the entity's strategy and business model to climate-related changes, developments and uncertainties.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose information about the entity's assessment of climate resilience using climate-related scenario analysis (paras 13-22).

disclosures.name: Strategy — Transition plans
disclosures.description: If the entity has a transition plan, disclose information about it including targets, actions, and progress.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose information about the entity's climate-related transition plan, including key assumptions and dependencies, decarbonisation targets, and planned changes to the business model (para 14).

disclosures.name: Risk management — Climate-related risk identification and assessment
disclosures.description: Disclose the processes used to identify, assess and manage climate-related risks.
disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose the processes the entity uses to identify, assess, prioritise, and monitor climate-related risks, and how these are integrated into the entity's overall risk management process (paras 25-27).

disclosures.name: Metrics — Greenhouse gas emissions
disclosures.description: Disclose absolute gross greenhouse gas emissions — Scope 1, Scope 2, and Scope 3 — generated during the reporting period.

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based)
requiredMetrics.description: Absolute gross location-based Scope 2 GHG emissions

requiredMetrics.name: Scope 2 GHG emissions (market-based)
requiredMetrics.description: Absolute gross market-based Scope 2 GHG emissions

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose Scope 1, 2 (location- and market-based), and Scope 3 GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent using GHG Protocol methodologies (para 29(a)).

disclosures.name: Metrics — GHG emissions intensity and energy
disclosures.description: Disclose the emission intensity per unit of physical or economic output for Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions.

requiredMetrics.name: Total energy consumption
requiredMetrics.description: Total energy consumption within the entity

requiredMetrics.name: Percentage from renewable sources
requiredMetrics.description: Proportion of energy from renewable sources

disclosures.guidanceText: Disclose emission intensity for Scope 1 + Scope 2 expressed per unit of physical or economic output. Disclose amount and percentage of energy consumption from renewable sources (para 29(b)-(d)).

disclosures.name: Targets — Climate-related targets
disclosures.description: Disclose the climate-related targets the entity has set, and progress against each target.

requiredMetrics.name: GHG reduction target
requiredMetrics.description: Target percentage reduction in GHG emissions

requiredMetrics.name: Target year
requiredMetrics.description: Year by which target is to be achieved

disclosures.guidanceText: For each climate-related target, disclose the metric used, objective of target, whether the target is absolute or intensity, the target base year, target period, milestones and interim targets, and performance against the target (paras 33-37).
